query: SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, a.progresso, a.itensProcessados, a.totalItens, COUNT(p.id) as procedimentos_count FROM arquivos a LEFT JOIN procedimentos p ON p.arquivoId = a.id WHERE a.status = 'processando' GROUP BY a.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, a.progresso, a.itensProcessados, a.totalItens, COUNT(p.id) as procedimentos_count FROM arquivos a LEFT JOIN procedimentos p ON p.arquivoId = a.id WHERE a.status = 'processando' GROUP BY a.id
